ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes that can be stored at the station */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., Active, Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to each bike */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the bike (e.g., Good, Bad) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "last_serviced_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance service */,
  "service_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next service is due */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the bike */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level (for electric bikes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rented */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the start of the rental */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the end of the rental */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., Member, Casual) */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who rented the bike */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the rental */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "rating_given" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user has rated the bike and station */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the start of the rental (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the member */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., Member, Casual) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the member joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the membership (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who made the payment */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental associated with the invoice */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who received the invoice */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount due */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of the invoice */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the invoice is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance task */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance task */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date when the next service is due */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance task */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who gave the rating */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being rated */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review comments */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., Super Admin, Regular Admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the admin account (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)
